creator: moggie@elasticmind.net
text:
Thanks for this. I'm not sure about removing the testsuite though, have 
gotten in touch with the patch submitter to discuss.

On 05/02/2012 11:50, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of www/py-werkzeug,
>
> Please note that PR ports/164794 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/164794
>
